summary_one_line: Input must place a valid OpenType table (GSUB/GPOS) header whose script-list contains the 4-byte 'DFLT' default-script FOURCC tag so find_script_index succeeds.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A well-formed OpenType GSUB/GPOS table whose ScriptList records the exact 4-byte FOURCC tag 'DFLT' (0x44 0x46 0x4c 0x54 = HB_OT_TAG_DEFAULT_SCRIPT), so the equality comparison inside g.find_script_index(HB_OT_TAG_DEFAULT_SCRIPT, ...) at line 566 matches and the true branch is taken.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Winner-resolving seeds carry intact ASCII table tags (GPOS/GSUB at offsets 0x0c-0x0f) and Seed 1 even contains the literal 'DFLT' bytes near offset 0x39, demonstrating the value_profile_cmplog input reproduces the exact magic tag the comparison demands; the branch is hit 15 times and resolved in 9/10 winner trials.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Loser-blocking seeds carry noise bytes at the tag offsets (e.g. 0xe0/0xff/0x4c) instead of the ASCII 'GPOS'/'GSUB' header, never construct a valid ScriptList containing 'DFLT', so the true side of line 566 is never taken (L: T=0 F=36) and all 10 loser trials stay blocked.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile_cmplog adds the I2SRandReplace mutator, which captures the comparison's expected operand (the 4-byte constant HB_OT_TAG_DEFAULT_SCRIPT) from the CmpLogObserver buffer and substitutes it directly into the input at the compared offset, planting the exact 'DFLT' tag. value_profile only has the CMP_MAP Hamming/prefix-distance gradient plus havoc/token mutators and no I2SRandReplace, so it must blindly stumble onto a 4-byte exact match it never achieves.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocked true side gates on an equality comparison against the default-script tag constant.
value_profile_cmplog wins decisively over value_profile via an I2S delta.
The winner takes the true branch and resolves while the loser never does.
Winner-resolving seeds carry intact ASCII OpenType table tags such as GPOS at the tag offsets.
A winner-resolving seed contains the literal DFLT tag bytes.
Loser-blocking seeds carry noise bytes at the leading/tag offsets instead of an ASCII table header.
The byte-diff shows winner bytes at offsets 0x0c-0x0f are concentrated on the GPOS ASCII tag while loser bytes are noise.
value_profile_cmplog adds the I2SRandReplace mutator on top of the CMP_MAP gradient.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: Ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 5561 --role W --fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 1 --seed b3e74f215af34936`; observed an I2S-floor dash row (mutation_op = -, ParentInfo-only) at depth 16 of the 17-level ancestor chain. The tool's trailing line reports '1 ancestor dash row(s) at depth 16', confirming an unwrapped I2SRandReplace find in this vpc lineage (lower bound).

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness gating a branch on a 4-byte exact-match constant in which value_profile resolves the branch in a comparable fraction of trials to value_profile_cmplog, showing the CMP_MAP gradient alone suffices and I2SRandReplace substitution is not the decisive technique.

weakest_evidence_point: Only one of five winner seeds shows the literal 'DFLT' bytes; the others are inferred to satisfy the tag-equality requirement structurally rather than shown to contain the exact FOURCC at the compared offset.
